name: Linguine Alle Vongole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place clams and 1/4 cup water in a large heavy pan.
2. Cover and simmer just until clams pop open (5 to 10 minutes).
3. When cool enough to handle, remove clams from shells and set aside. Save a few clams in shells for garnish if desired. Strain clam broth through dampened muslin to remove grit; reserve broth.
4. Cook linguine in boiling salted water until al dente. Drain well.
5. While cooking linguine, melt butter and oil in a wide frying pan over medium heat. Add onion and cook, stirring often, until soft.
6. Mix in garlic, wine, and strained clam broth. Bring to boil, stirring occasionally, and reduce liquid by about half.
7. Add clams, season with salt and pepper to taste, and stir in parsley.
8. Arrange linguine on a warm serving platter. Spoon hot sauce over linguine.
9. Garnish with reserved clams in shells if desired.
Serves: 4
